name: Globex Design System
description: A warm, modern Design System for approachable innovation narratives.

colors.name: Globex Purple
colors.description: Use for primary brand presence, hero moments, and distinctive section headers.

colors.name: Orbit Teal
colors.description: Use for supporting graphics, secondary actions, and optimistic contrast.

colors.name: Solar Coral
colors.description: Use for energetic highlights, important annotations, and selective emphasis.

colors.name: Night
colors.description: Use for premium dark backgrounds and high-impact title slides.

colors.name: Mist
colors.description: Use for clean backgrounds where warmth is preferred over stark white.

colors.name: Comet Gold
colors.description: Use for cautionary states, risk markers, and important operational notes.

logo.name: Primary Logo
logo.description: Use as the standard logo on light slide backgrounds.

persistentElements.name: Brand Logo
persistentElements.description: Required recurring logo placement for every slide.

persistentElements.name: Slide Number
persistentElements.description: Required recurring slide number placement for every slide.

persistentElements.name: Accent Corner
persistentElements.description: Optional governed accent shape for slides that need additional brand energy.
